BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: PAPA JOHN'S TEAM MEMBER EMERGENCY RELIEF

IRS990EZ.PrimaryExemptPurposeTxt: FUND PROVIDES ASSISTANCE TO INDIVIDUAL EMPLOYEES IN NEED AS A RESULT OF A NATURAL DISASTER OR OTHER EMERGENCY EVENTS.

ProgramSrvcAccomplishmentGrp.DescriptionProgramSrvcAccomTxt: FUND PROVIDES ASSISTANCE TO INDIVIDUAL EMPLOYEES IN NEED AS A RESULT OF A NATURAL DISASTER OR OTHER EMERGENCY EVENTS.

TransferPrsnlBnftContractsDecl.DeclarationDesc: THE ORGANIZATION DID NOT, DURING THE YEAR, RECEIVE ANY FUNDS, DIRECTLY,OR INDIRECTLY, TO PAY PREMIUMS ON A PERSONAL BENEFIT CONTRACT.THE ORGANIZATION, DID NOT, DURING THE YEAR, PAY ANY PREMIUMS, DIRECTLY,OR INDIRECTLY, ON A PERSONAL BENEFIT CONTRACT.
